name: flowforge_ai
description: Tracer bullet SDLC plugin: 10 agents across 5 phases (plan, build, verify, ship, operate), 34 knowledge skills, 10 commands. Ralph Loop self-correction, Linear issue integration, scope.json as single source of truth.

code-review-graph.name: code-review-graph
code-review-graph.description: Visual code review analysis with dependency graphs and change impact assessment

highlights: 10 consolidated role-based agents (product-manager, ux-designer, fullstack-engineer, qa-engineer, security-engineer, performance-engineer, devops-engineer, sre-engineer, data-engineer, technical-writer)
5-phase SDLC: Plan → Build → Verify → Ship → Operate
Tracer bullet slices — vertical schema+api+ui+tests per feature
Ralph Loop — self-correcting inner/outer retry with circuit breaker
scope.json as single source of truth with Linear issue integration
Handoff documents keep each phase context bounded
34 knowledge skills injected as methodology context
Integrated code-review-graph for visual dependency analysis
